parameters.query:
UPDATE [GUEST_DOC]
SET In_Progress = 0,
    Count = 0
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

INSERT INTO GUESTS (
    Guest_Phone,
    Name,
    Check_In_Date,
    Checked_In,
    Document_URL,
    Unique_ID,
    Shared,
    In_Property,
    Resort_ID
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}',
    '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
    '{{ $('Date & Time2').first().json.currentDate }}',
    0,
    (
        SELECT STRING_AGG(value, ',')
        FROM (
            SELECT TOP ({{ $('Microsoft SQL').first().json.count_guest }}) value
            FROM STRING_SPLIT(
                '{{ $('Microsoft SQL').first().json.Document_URLs }}',
                ','
            )
            WHERE value <> ''
        ) AS x
    ),
    '{{ $('Code43').first().json.uniqueId }}',
    1,
    1,
    '{{ $('Code42').first().json.propertyid.toUpperCase() }}'
);

INSERT INTO DOCSCONTEXT (
    Guest_Phone,
    Document_URL,
    Document_Type,
    Doc_Name,
    Document_Value,
    Extracted_Text,
    Upload_Date,
    Unique_ID,
    Quality,
    Success
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.Guest_Phone }}',
    '{{ $json.Document_URL }}',
    '{{ $json.Document_Type }}',
    '{{ $json.Name }}',
    '{{ $json.Address }}',
    '{{ $json.Extracted_Text }}',
    '{{ $json.Upload_Date }}',
    '{{ $json.Unique_ID }}',
    '{{ $json.Confidence_Score }}',
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.Status }}' = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
);

INSERT INTO DOCSCONTEXT (
    Guest_Phone,
    Document_URL,
    Document_Type,
    Doc_Name,
    Document_Value,
    Extracted_Text,
    Upload_Date,
    Unique_ID,
    Quality,
    Success
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.Guest_Phone }}',
    '{{ $json.Document_URL }}',
    '{{ $json.Document_Type }}',
    '{{ $json.Name }}',
    '{{ $json.Address }}',
    '{{ $json.Extracted_Text }}',
     '{{ $json.Upload_Date }}',
    '{{ $json.Unique_ID }}',
    '{{ $json.Confidence_Score }}',
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.Status }}' = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
);

UPDATE GUEST_DOC
SET 
    Name = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
    Document_URLs = '{{ $('Code25').first().json.blobUrl }},{{ $json.data[0]["Document_URLs"] }}',count_guest=count_guest+1
WHERE 
    Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

UPDATE [GUEST_DOC]
SET In_Progress = 1,
    Count = 1
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

UPDATE [GUEST_DOC]
SET In_Progress = 0,
    Count = 0
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

UPDATE GUEST_DOC
SET 
    Name = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
    Document_URLs = '{{ $('Code46').first().json.blobUrl }},{{ $json.data[0]["Document_URLs"] }}',
    In_Progress = 0,
  count_guest=count_guest+1
WHERE 
    Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

INSERT INTO GUEST_DOC (Guest_Phone, Name, Document_URLs,In_Progress,
    Count)
    VALUES (
        '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}',
        '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
        '{{ $('Code46').first().json.blobUrl }}',0,0
    );

UPDATE GUESTS
SET Checkout_Date = '{{ $('Date & Time3').first().json.currentDate }}',
    In_Property = 0
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.guestId }}';

UPDATE GUESTS
SET Special_Request = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.api.POST.realrequest }}'
WHERE Unique_ID = (
    SELECT TOP 1 Unique_ID
    FROM GUESTS
    WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}'
    ORDER BY Check_In_Date DESC
);

SELECT *
FROM RESORTS
WHERE Resort_ID = (
    SELECT TOP 1 Resort_ID
    FROM GUESTS
    WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}'
    ORDER BY Check_In_Date DESC
);

MERGE INTO GUESTS AS Target
USING (VALUES (
    '{{ $('If10').item.json.data[0]["Unique ID"] }}',
    1
)) AS Source (Unique_ID, Checked_In)
ON Target.Unique_ID = Source.Unique_ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET Checked_In = Source.Checked_In
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (Unique_ID, Checked_In)
    VALUES (Source.Unique_ID, Source.Checked_In);

-- SQL Server version - Conditionally add '91' prefix only for 10-digit numbers
SELECT *
FROM GUESTS
WHERE Guest_Phone = CASE 
    WHEN LEN('{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.api.POST.travonumber }}') = 10 
    THEN '91' + '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.api.POST.travonumber }}'
    ELSE '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.api.POST.travonumber }}'
  END
  AND Resort_ID = '{{ $json.data[0].Resort_ID }}';

INSERT INTO GUESTS (
  Guest_Phone,
  Name,
  Checked_In,
  Document_URL,
  Unique_ID
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
  0,  -- FALSE represented as 0
  '{{ $json.document_urls }}',
  '{{ $json.unique_id }}'
);

INSERT INTO GUESTS (
    Checked_In,
    Notification_Sent,
    Document_URL,
    Resort_Name,
    Resort_Location,
    Resort_Coordinates,
    Unique_ID,
    Guest_Phone,
    Name,
    Total_Guests,
    Check_In_Date,
    Check_Out_Date,
    Tenant_ID
) VALUES (
    FALSE,  -- Checked In
    '',     -- Notification Sent (empty)
    '',     -- Document_URL (empty)
    '{{ $("Google Sheets9").first().json["Resort_Name"] }}',
    '{{ $("Google Sheets9").first().json.Location }}',
    '{{ $("Google Sheets9").first().json.Coordinates }}',
    '{{ $json.uniqueId }}',
    '{{ $("Loop Over Items").first().json.Phone }}',
    '{{ $("Loop Over Items").item.json.Name }}',
    '{{ $("Loop Over Items").first().json["Total_Guests"] }}',
    '{{ $("Loop Over Items").first().json["Check-in_Date"] }}',
    '{{ $("Loop Over Items").first().json["Check-out_Date"] }}',
    '{{ $("Google Sheets9").first().json["Tenant_ID"] }}'
);

MERGE INTO Guests AS target
USING (SELECT '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}' AS Guest_Phone) AS source
ON target.Guest_Phone = source.Guest_Phone
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET 
      Checked_In = 0, -- FALSE
      Document_URL = '{{ $('Microsoft SQL46').first().json.Document_URLs }}',
      Unique_ID = '{{ $json.uniqueId }}'
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (Guest_Phone, Checked_In, Document_URL, Unique_ID)
    VALUES (
      '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}',
      0,
      '{{ $('Microsoft SQL46').first().json.Document_URLs }}',
      '{{ $json.uniqueId }}'
    );

SELECT *
FROM GUESTS
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}'
  AND Resort_ID = '{{ $('Code42').first().json.propertyid.toUpperCase() }}';

INSERT INTO GUESTS (
    Guest_Phone,
    Name,
    Check_In_Date,
    Checked_In,
    Document_URL,
    Shared,
    In_Property,
    Resort_ID
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}',
    '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
    '{{ $('Date & Time4').first().json.currentDate }}',
    0,
    '{{ $('Code50').first().json.results[0].blobUrl }}, {{ $('Code50').first().json.results[1].blobUrl }}',
    1,
    1,
    '{{ $('Microsoft SQL38').item.json.Resort_ID }}'
);

UPDATE GUEST_DOC
SET 
    Name = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userName }}',
    Document_URLs = '{{ $('Code46').first().json.blobUrl }},{{ $json.data[0]["Document_URLs"] }}',
    In_Progress = 0,
  count_guest=count_guest+2
WHERE 
    Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

-- For single item input (your current case with 1 image)
SELECT 
    Document_URL,
    Upload_Date 
FROM DOCSCONTEXT 
WHERE Document_URL = '{{ $json.message.image.link }}'
ORDER BY Upload_Date ASC;

values.content:
=You are an ID verification system for Indian hotels.  
You are given OCR-extracted text from an uploaded document.  
The uploaded document can be one of these valid IDs: Aadhaar Card, Driving License, or Voter ID (Election Card).  

Verification rules:
1. Accept the document if it is recognizable as one of these valid IDs, even if some fields are missing due to poor OCR.  
   - Aadhaar Card: look for "Aadhaar", "UIDAI", "Government of India", or a 12-digit number.  
   - Driving License: look for "Driving Licence", "DL No", "RTO", "Transport Department", vehicle categories.  
   - Voter ID: look for "Election Commission of India", "Elector’s Name", "EPIC No", "Gender", "Age", "DOB", "Address".  

2. Also accept back sides of IDs:
   - Driving License backside may show: address, validity dates, vehicle categories, state transport authority details.  
   - Voter ID backside may show: address, constituency, ERO details, barcodes, or regional language labels.  
   Even if the backside does not contain the ID number, it should still be treated as valid if it matches the format of a known Indian ID.  

3. Only reject if:
   - The text clearly does not belong to Aadhaar, Driving License, or Voter ID.  
   - The text is too garbled/unreadable.  
   - The text is unrelated or fake (e.g., random text, hotel bills, receipts).  

4. Response format:
   - If valid → `Valid ID`  
   - If invalid → `Invalid ID: <short reason>`  

Return only one line. Do not add any extra explanation.  

Now, analyze this OCR text:  
{{ $json.Extracted_Text }}

=You are an ID verification system for Indian hotels.  
You are given OCR-extracted text from an uploaded document.  
The uploaded document can be one of these valid IDs: Aadhaar Card, Driving License, or Voter ID (Election Card).  

Verification rules:
1. Accept the document if it is recognizable as one of these valid IDs, even if some fields are missing due to poor OCR.  
   - Aadhaar Card: look for "Aadhaar", "UIDAI", "Government of India", or a 12-digit number.  
   - Driving License: look for "Driving Licence", "DL No", "RTO", "Transport Department", vehicle categories.  
   - Voter ID: look for "Election Commission of India", "Elector’s Name", "EPIC No", "Gender", "Age", "DOB", "Address".  

2. Also accept back sides of IDs:
   - Driving License backside may show: address, validity dates, vehicle categories, state transport authority details.  
   - Voter ID backside may show: address, constituency, ERO details, barcodes, or regional language labels.  
   Even if the backside does not contain the ID number, it should still be treated as valid if it matches the format of a known Indian ID.  

3. Only reject if:
   - The text clearly does not belong to Aadhaar, Driving License, or Voter ID.  
   - The text is too garbled/unreadable.  
   - The text is unrelated or fake (e.g., random text, hotel bills, receipts).  

4. Response format:
   - If valid → `Valid ID`  
   - If invalid → `Invalid ID: <short reason>`  

Return only one line. Do not add any extra explanation.  

Now, analyze this OCR text:  
{{ $json.Extracted_Text }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE [GUEST_DOC]
SET In_Progress = 1,
    Count = 1
WHERE Guest_Phone = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.userSession.userPhoneNumber }}';

UPDATE RESORTS
SET Resort_ID='{{ $json.body.userSession.api.POST.uniqueid.toUpperCase() }}'
WHERE Resort_Phone_Number='{{ $json.body.userSession.api.POST.phonenumber }}'
